Interface Equipable

All Known Implementing Classes:
BaseArmor, BaseWeapon, HardstoneArmor, HardstoneSword, IronArmor, IronSword, MithrilArmor, MithrilSword, PlatinumArmor, PlatinumSword, StoneArmor, StoneSword, VibraniumArmor, VibraniumSword, WoodenSword
public interface Equipable
Represents an item that can be equipped and unequipped by the player, such as a weapon or armor.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    equip(Player p)
    Applies this item's stat bonuses to the given player.
    void
    unequip(Player p)
    Removes this item's stat bonuses from the given player.

  • Method Details

    • equip

      void equip(Player p)
      Applies this item's stat bonuses to the given player.
      Parameters:
      p - the player who equips this item

    • unequip

      void unequip(Player p)
      Removes this item's stat bonuses from the given player.
      Parameters:
      p - the player who unequips this item
